subject: v0.14.2
body: ## [0.14.2](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v0.14.1...v0.14.2) (2015-11-17) ### Bug Fixes * **numericSelector:** pass currentValue as the refined value, not the full obj ([9286b4b](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/9286b4b)) * **website:** search icon ([623f071](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/623f071))
